Helen Whately

MP for Faversham and Mid Kent

I'm Helen Whately, the Member of Parliament for Faversham and Mid Kent. Here you’ll find more information about my work and campaigns, how you can get involved, and what I can do to help you. Follow me on Facebook and X for updates. 

 

Sign up to Helen's newsletter

My 6 Local Priorities for Faversham & Mid Kent

  • Standing Up For You

  • Keeping Kent Moving

  • Defending Our Countryside

  • Improving Our Healthcare

  • Taking Action on Crime

  • Backing Local Business
